title: cyclodium abbreviatum
intro: Cyclodium abbreviatum, also known as abbreviated spleenwort, is a species of fern native to Asia and is a member of the Blechnaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Cyclodium abbreviatum is typically used as a decoction or infusion, and can also be found in the form of dried leaves and capsules for medicinal purposes.
